name: Enchilada Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into a shallow, 2 1/2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle meat with minced onion and crushed garlic. Heat, uncovered, on ROAST for 6 minutes, stirring occasionally to break up the meat.
3. Drain excess fat. Stir in chili powder, pepper, water, and tomato sauce until combined. Return to oven to heat, uncovered, for 5 minutes on ROAST.
4. Alternately layer tortillas, meat sauce, and cheese in a round, 1 1/2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish. Ensure the last layer is cheese.
5. Cover and return to oven to heat until cheese is melted, about 9-11 minutes on ROAST.
